creator: rajil.s@gmail.com
text:
I am using upstream binary package from ports. However, i extracted the sources as you suggested and see that the usb device is defined

# grep -r 4903 work
work/webcamd-4.12.0.1/media_tree/drivers/media/usb/hdpvr/hdpvr.h:#define HD_PVR_PRODUCT_ID4     0x4903
work/webcamd-4.12.0.1/man4/hdpvr.4:.It 2040:4903         Ta "Hauppauge HD-PVR"

#grep -r 2040 work
work/webcamd-4.12.0.1/man4/hdpvr.4:.It 2040:4903         Ta "Hauppauge HD-PVR"

The upstream package was compiled using:
Name           : webcamd
Version        : 4.12.0.1
Options        :
        CUSE           : on
        DEBUG          : off
        DVB            : on
        HAL            : on
        INPUT          : on
        KEYBOARD       : off
        MOUSE          : off
        RADIO          : on
        VT_CLIENT      : off
        VT_SERVER      : off
        WEBCAM         : on
Shared Libs required:
        libdbus-1.so.3
        libhal.so.1
